rationale: drain_regression_test.go reproduces the 4-endpoint + gemini/minimax overrides config with empty spec, asserts ≤1 executor invocation (vs historical 19), handles gemini-binary by stubbing executor at loop boundary (documented), and runs in default go test ./....

findings.summary: Test stubs executor at the loop boundary instead of using a real harness binary; rationale documented in the file header. This is a sound choice — guards the dispatch/loop regression rather than the harness runner.
Belt-and-braces assertions on ResolveProfileLadder/ResolveTierModelRef call counters add useful future-proofing beyond the literal AC.
